Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Buy from reputable breeders who can provide captive-bred specimens - wild-caught are more defensive and stressed. Look for well-started juveniles (1-2 inches) rather than tiny slings, as they're hardier. Avoid sellers who claim these make good beginner tarantulas or downplay their defensive nature.
